features: F5: Embeddings Service — embed_text() and embed_batch() functions using openai SDK pointed at OpenRouter with model openai/text-embedding-3-small
F6: Cosine Similarity Retriever — in-process NumPy cosine similarity search over all stored chunk embeddings, returning top-K chunks with video metadata
F7: Ingest API Endpoint — POST /api/ingest accepts title/description/url/transcript, runs chunking→embedding→storage pipeline, returns chunk count summary
F8: Streaming LLM Generation — openrouter.py wraps openai SDK for streaming anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6, route handler returns FastAPI StreamingResponse with SSE formatting

criteria.name: embed_text_returns_float_list
criteria.description: Calling embed_text() with a non-empty string returns a Python list of floats with length 1536 (text-embedding-3-small dimensionality) and no None or NaN values

criteria.name: embed_text_empty_string_raises_error
criteria.description: Calling embed_text('') raises a ValueError (or subclass) with a descriptive message — it must not silently return a zero-vector, a list of NaNs, or call the OpenRouter API with an empty string

criteria.name: embed_batch_returns_correct_shape
criteria.description: Calling embed_batch() with a list of N texts (N >= 1) returns a list of exactly N embedding vectors, each of length 1536, in the same order as the input texts

criteria.name: embed_batch_empty_list_returns_empty_list
criteria.description: Calling embed_batch([]) returns an empty list [] immediately without making any API call to OpenRouter — verified by confirming no HTTP request is issued (e.g., by mocking the client and asserting it is never called)

criteria.name: embeddings_use_openrouter_base_url
criteria.description: The openai SDK client in embeddings.py is initialized with base_url='https://openrouter.ai/api/v1' and api_key loaded from OPENROUTER_API_KEY — no hardcoded keys in source files

criteria.name: cosine_retriever_returns_top_k
criteria.description: retriever.py retrieve() function called with a query embedding and k=5 returns exactly 5 results (or fewer only if fewer than 5 chunks exist in the DB), each result containing at minimum: chunk content, video title, chunk id, and a numeric cosine similarity score between -1.0 and 1.0. When the DB is empty, retrieve() returns an empty list without raising an exception.

criteria.name: cosine_retriever_ranks_correctly
criteria.description: When a query embedding is identical to one stored chunk's embedding, that chunk is ranked #1 in retrieval results with a cosine similarity score of 1.0 (or within floating-point tolerance of 0.0001)

criteria.name: ingest_endpoint_creates_chunks
criteria.description: POST /api/ingest with valid title/description/url/transcript returns HTTP 200 with a JSON body containing a 'chunks_created' field with an integer value greater than 0, and those chunks are queryable in SQLite afterward

criteria.name: ingest_endpoint_stores_embeddings
criteria.description: After a successful POST /api/ingest, every chunk record in the 'chunks' table for that video has a non-null 'embedding' column containing a valid JSON array of 1536 floats

criteria.name: ingest_endpoint_validates_input
criteria.description: POST /api/ingest must return HTTP 422 with a structured validation error body (not a 500) for all of the following cases: (1) a required field is absent entirely (e.g., no 'transcript' key), (2) a required string field is present but set to an empty string '""', and (3) the 'url' field contains a value that is not a valid URL format. Each 422 response body must identify which field failed validation.

criteria.name: llm_stream_produces_sse_format
criteria.description:
The async generator function inside openrouter.py is unit-tested directly (not via HTTP) by calling it with a short test prompt and collecting all yielded strings. At least one yielded string must match the pattern 'data: <non-empty-content>

'. The content portion must be a non-empty string token from the model response. No yielded chunk may be an empty 'data: 

' frame except for a terminal 'data: [DONE]

' signal if the implementation emits one.

criteria.name: llm_stream_uses_correct_model
criteria.description: The openrouter.py streaming call specifies model='anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6' and the OpenRouter base URL — confirmed by inspecting the client initialization and the model parameter passed to chat.completions.create()

criteria.name: llm_stream_content_type_header
criteria.description: The FastAPI StreamingResponse constructed in the F8 route handler is instantiated with media_type='text/event-stream' and includes a 'Cache-Control: no-cache' header — verifiable by code inspection of the StreamingResponse constructor call and confirmed via an HTTP client hitting the route (or a dedicated Sprint 2 test route) and asserting the response Content-Type header equals 'text/event-stream' and Cache-Control contains 'no-cache'

criteria.name: llm_stream_handles_api_error
criteria.description: If the OpenRouter chat completions API raises an exception during streaming (e.g., authentication failure, network timeout, or non-200 status), the generator must not silently yield zero chunks. It must either: (a) raise the exception so FastAPI returns an HTTP 502 or 500 response, or (b) yield a final SSE error event formatted as 'data: {"error": "<message>"}\n\n' before closing the stream. Silent empty responses are not acceptable.

criteria.name: chunker_integration_produces_contextualized_text
criteria.description: When ingest is called, chunker.py produces chunks using HybridChunker with max_tokens=512, and each chunk's stored content is the contextualized text (heading-enriched via chunker.contextualize()), not raw paragraph text

criteria.name: no_raw_sql_in_route_handlers
criteria.description: The ingest.py route handler contains zero direct aiosqlite cursor calls — all database reads and writes go through repository.py methods (verified by code inspection: no 'cursor.execute' or 'conn.execute' calls outside of repository.py and schema.py)

criteria.name: health_endpoint_reflects_ingested_data
criteria.description: After seeding (Sprint 1) and at least one additional POST /api/ingest call, GET /api/health returns a JSON body where 'chunk_count' is greater than 0 and increases after each successful ingest

criteria.name: embeddings_error_handling
criteria.description: If the OpenRouter embeddings API call fails (e.g., network error or invalid API key), embed_text() raises a descriptive Python exception that propagates as an HTTP 502 or 500 from the ingest endpoint — not a silent failure that stores null embeddings
